summary: Completed testing of Site Map & Link Manager feature. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly. Backend sitemap endpoint returns 494 pages with proper type categorization and linked_from references. Frontend displays all page types with filter pills, search, collapsible groups, and quick-link actions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site Map & Link Manager feature fully tested. Backend endpoint GET /api/website-admin/sitemap returns aggregated page data with types (shop, collection, product, info, category) and linked_from references. Frontend at /admin/sitemap shows all pages with filter pills, search, collapsible groups, Copy URL, Open in new tab, and '+' dropdown with Add to Main Nav/Top Bar/Homepage/Footer options. Website Hub at /admin/website-hub shows 'Site Map & Links' card in Quick Actions section.

backend: GET /api/website-admin/sitemap - returns 494 pages with proper structure
Sitemap summary counts match actual page counts (shop:8, collection:391, product:50, info:7, category:38)
Pages have linked_from references showing Nav:, Footer:, Homepage: sources
Categories on homepage have 'Homepage: Shop Categories' badge
frontend: Site Map & Link Manager page loads at /admin/sitemap
Website Hub shows 'Site Map & Links' card in Quick Actions
Filter pills work (All, Shop Pages, Collections, Products, Info Pages, Categories)
Search input filters pages by name or URL
Collapsible groups expand/collapse on header click
Copy URL button copies URL and shows toast notification
'+' dropdown shows Add to Main Nav, Add to Top Bar, Add to Footer options
Categories show 'Add to Homepage' option in dropdown
Add to Footer action works and shows success toast
Homepage badges (Homepage: Floor Tiles, Homepage: Shop Categories) display correctly
'Not linked' badge shows for pages not linked anywhere
